explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: The "Ingredion Business Transformation with AI" document references the need for governance in the implementation of AI capabilities and foundational infrastructure.
governance.path_to_improvement: Document AI governance structure, including oversight of vendor AI tools.

relevant_sources.summary: The "Ingredion Business Transformation with AI" document provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It implies transparency by describing future AI capabilities for trend analysis, suggesting insight into AI operations. Furthermore, the mention of AI capabilities and foundational infrastructure points to the need for governance and transparency in their implementation.
relevant_sources.title: Ingredion Business Transformation with AI

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: The "Ingredion Business Transformation with AI" document describes future AI capabilities for trend analysis. It also references the need for transparency in the implementation of AI capabilities and foundational infrastructure.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

relevant_sources.summary: The "Ingredion Business Transformation with AI" document provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It implies transparency by describing future AI capabilities for trend analysis, suggesting insight into AI operations. Furthermore, the mention of AI capabilities and foundational infrastructure points to the need for governance and transparency in their implementation.
relevant_sources.title: Ingredion Business Transformation with AI

summary.overall_findings: Ingredion's public documentation was reviewed across 7 responsible AI pillars, and no qualifying evidence was identified. While the assessment reviewed 7 publicly available sources, no documented AI governance, oversight, or accountability practices were found.
